metadata.title: Wafinix — Website, System & App Development
metadata.description: A software house for small businesses to enterprises: websites, POS & ERP systems, integrated orders & payments, AI & chatbots. Indonesia & global.

footer.blurb: We help your business grow with thoughtfully crafted websites, systems, and apps — from small businesses to enterprises, for Indonesia and the world.

hero.title: Digital products that help your business <hl>grow</hl>
hero.subtitle: Wafinix builds websites, systems, and apps — from company profiles to ERP, with orders & payments recorded automatically. For small businesses to enterprises, in Indonesia and worldwide.

services.title: One team for all your digital needs
services.subtitle: From the first landing page to the system that runs your operations — we design, build, and maintain it.

industries.title: Trusted across industries
industries.subtitle: Every industry has unique needs. We've already shaped the solutions.

global.title: From <hl>Indonesia</hl> to the world
global.subtitle: Bilingual websites, prices in Rupiah or USD, and both local and international payments — your business is ready to serve customers anywhere.
points: Bilingual Indonesian & English with one click
Local payments (QRIS, transfer, e-wallet) & international (cards, crypto)
Fast performance with a global CDN

process.title: We don't just start coding
process.subtitle: Every project begins with thorough planning — so the result is focused, consistent, and easy to grow.

steps.title: Consultation & Discovery
steps.desc: We understand your business goals, target users, and needs before a single line is written.

steps.title: Planning & Documents
steps.desc: A PRD, system architecture, and database design come first — not just build-on-request.

steps.title: UI/UX Design
steps.desc: Warm, easy-to-use mockups and prototypes, approved before development begins.

steps.title: Development
steps.desc: Incremental coding with testing at every step, plus transparent progress updates.

steps.title: Launch & Support
steps.desc: Deployment, training for your team, and maintenance to keep everything running smoothly.

testimonials.title: What they say
testimonials.note: Illustrative — to be replaced with real client testimonials.

items.quote: The POS generates daily reports automatically. Now we know our stock and revenue exactly, no manual counting.
items.name: Rani

items.quote: Our booking site leveled up. Guests reserve a room and pay right away, and the data stays tidy.
items.name: Bagus

items.quote: What sets them apart is starting from documents. Our needs were truly understood before any work began.
items.name: Hendra

security.title: Secure from the foundation
security.subtitle: Transaction security is our highest priority — not an afterthought.

items.title: Encryption & HTTPS
items.desc: End-to-end SSL and strict security headers protect every connection.

items.title: OWASP protection
items.desc: Input validation, anti-XSS, and rate limiting following OWASP standards.

items.title: Verified payments
items.desc: Signed webhooks with amount matching — statuses can't be faked.

items.title: Audit & backup
items.desc: Every key action is logged; data is backed up regularly and recoverable.

cta.title: Ready to start your project?
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you need — the first consultation is free, no strings attached.

layanan.title: What we build
layanan.subtitle: From the first page to the system that runs your business — everything thoughtfully planned, cleanly built, and maintained.
layanan.techSubtitle: We pick the right tool for each problem — not one hammer for everything.
layanan.ctaSubtitle: Tell us what you need and we'll map out the best solution — free.

solusi.title: Solutions for your industry
solusi.subtitle: Every field has its own challenges. Here's how we solve them.
solusi.ctaSubtitle: We build custom solutions all the time. Tell us your specific needs.

harga.title: Transparent pricing
harga.subtitle: Four package tiers for different needs. Prices are indicative — tailored to your project scope.
harga.note: Prices exclude tax where applicable. Contact us for an exact quote.
harga.ctaSubtitle: Tell us your needs — we'll help you choose the best fit, free.

tentang.title: We build like we're building for ourselves
tentang.subtitle: Wafinix was born from the belief that good software starts with thorough planning — not just coding.
story: The name Wafinix is inspired by the phoenix — a bird that rises and transforms. That's what we do for businesses: turn manual processes into living, growing digital systems.
We serve small businesses to enterprises, in Indonesia and worldwide. Every project starts with planning documents so the result is focused, consistent, and easy to grow.

values.title: Show, don't claim
values.desc: This very site is our portfolio — the motion, 3D, and security are real.

values.title: Warm & human
values.desc: Technology can be advanced, but the experience must feel comfortable and approachable.

values.title: Document-driven
values.desc: We design before we code — PRD, architecture, design — to stay on target.

values.title: Secure from the foundation
values.desc: Transaction security is our highest priority, not an afterthought.

tentang.ctaSubtitle: Tell us your idea — the first consultation is free.

kontak.title: Get in touch
kontak.subtitle: Have a project or a question? We usually reply the same day.

legal.disclaimer: This is a general template not yet reviewed by legal counsel. Adapt it to your entity before publishing.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using Wafinix services, you agree to the following terms.

sections.heading: 1. Services
sections.body: Wafinix provides website, system, and application development within the scope agreed in the proposal.

sections.heading: 2. Payment
sections.body: Payment follows the agreed terms. Work begins after the initial payment is received and recorded.

sections.heading: 3. Revisions & Warranty
sections.body: Revision counts and bug-warranty periods follow the selected package. Out-of-scope changes may incur extra fees.

sections.heading: 4. Timeline
sections.body: Time estimates are indicative and may change with new requirements or delays in client-provided materials.

sections.heading: 5. Cancellation
sections.body: Cancellation after work has started may incur charges for work already completed.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We respect your privacy and collect only the data we need.

sections.heading: 1. Data we collect
sections.body: Name, email, WhatsApp number, and project details you submit via forms or orders.

sections.heading: 2. How we use it
sections.body: To respond to requests, process orders, and communicate about your project.

sections.heading: 3. Payments
sections.body: Transactions are processed via trusted payment providers. We do not store your card details.

sections.heading: 4. Security
sections.body: Data is stored with strict access control and encryption, limited to operational needs.

sections.heading: 5. Your rights
sections.body: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data at any time.

license.title: License & SLA
license.intro: Terms for code ownership, licensing, and service levels.

sections.heading: 1. Ownership
sections.body: Upon full payment, project code and assets become the client's, except separately licensed third-party components.

sections.heading: 2. Third-party licenses
sections.body: Open-source libraries follow their own licenses. Paid assets (fonts, images) require separate licensing if requested.

sections.heading: 3. Bug warranty
sections.body: Free bug fixes during the package's warranty period. New requirements are not included.

sections.heading: 4. Support SLA
sections.body: Business & Enterprise packages include a response SLA. Exact response times are agreed in the contract.

sections.heading: 5. Maintenance
sections.body: Optional maintenance packages cover updates, monitoring, and regular backups.

order.title: Order a Package
order.subtitle: Fill in a few quick steps, then send it to us on WhatsApp. Our team replies with a quote and payment steps.
order.briefPlaceholder: E.g. an online store for fashion products, ~30 items, needs payment & WhatsApp integration.
order.note: After sending, an order summary opens in WhatsApp for you to send to our team.
order.waGreeting: Hello Wafinix, I'd like to order:
